signal_interpretation.ENG_PremierLeague: No reliable proper-score gain; score Top1 and total Top1 degraded.
signal_interpretation.ESP_LaLiga: 1X2 Brier/RPS and joint log improved; score Top1 improved; score Top3 degraded, therefore four-target gate failed.
signal_interpretation.GER_Bundesliga: 1X2 accuracy slightly improved but Brier/RPS and score Top1 degraded.
signal_interpretation.ITA_SerieA: Total RPS and score metrics improved but 1X2 Brier/RPS/accuracy and total Top1 degraded.
signal_interpretation.FRA_Ligue1: 1X2 Brier/RPS and score Top3 improved, but total RPS noninferiority and total Top1 failed.

holdout_lock.reason: The 2025/26 forward holdout has now been observed. Retuning on it would convert the forward test into an in-sample optimization exercise.

next_clean_validation: future independent holdout not used for tuning
